Bash(cd C:/Users/optilab/desktop/CADENCE && python -c "
import ast, sys, os
files = [
    'cadence/constants.py',
    'cadence/config.py',
    'cadence/data/wavelet_features.py',
    'cadence/data/interbrain_features.py',
    'cadence/data/preprocessors.py',
    'cadence/regression/group_lasso.py',
    'cadence/regression/time_blocked_cv.py',
    'cadence/coupling/pathways.py',
    'cadence/coupling/discovery.py',
    'cadence/coupling/estimator.py',
    'cadence/visualization/spectral.py',
    'cadence/visualization/discovery.py',
    'cadence/visualization/heatmaps.py',
    'cadence/synthetic.py',
    'scripts/run_session.py',
    'scripts/run_discovery.py',
    'scripts/run_synthetic_v2.py',
]
errors = []
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f\) as fh:
            ast.parse\(fh.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'  OK: {f}'\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\(f'  ERR: {f} - {e}'\)
        errors.append\(f\)
if errors:
    print\(f'\\n{len\(errors\)} files with syntax errors'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
else:
    print\(f'\\nAll {len\(files\)} files pass syntax check'\)
")
